description: Logical block that synchronizes slides rendered by each slider-layout block declared within it. It does not expose any props of its own — it only accepts a children list of slider-layout blocks, all of which must share identical props and values.
Renders its children blocks only when the current device is desktop. Uses composition: children — no configurable props.
Renders its children blocks only when the current device is detected as mobile. No configurable props — the block uses composition:children to receive child blocks.
Renders its children blocks only when the current device screen size matches the tablet breakpoint. Uses composition: children — no configurable props beyond child block declarations.

Renders its children blocks only when the current device is identified as a phone. No configurable props — the block works exclusively via block composition (children). Source confirmed at https://github.com/vtex-apps/responsive-layout and https://developers.vtex.com/docs/apps/vtex.responsive-layout.
The stack-layout block allows you to stack blocks on top of each other, controlling their z-index layering order.

description: Block that defines rendering conditions based on the telemarketing (impersonation) context, displaying different child blocks depending on whether the conditions are met.

props.name: conditions
props.description: List of desired conditions to be evaluated for rendering.

props.name: matchType
props.description: Layout rendering criteria: all (all conditions must be met), any (at least one must be met), or none (no condition must be met).

props.name: Then
props.description: Name of the block to be rendered when the conditions are met. If not defined, children blocks are rendered instead.

props.name: Else
props.description: Name of the block to be rendered when the conditions are not met.

description: Renders a tab layout component that organizes content into switchable tabs. Composed with tab-list and tab-content child blocks.

props.name: defaultActiveTabId
props.description: ID of the desired tab to be rendered as the default one. If not provided, the first declared tab is used.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

description: Renders a list of tabs. Must be declared as a child of tab-layout and contain tab-list.item or tab-list.item.children blocks.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

description: Renders a single tab item inside a tab-list block, with a label and a tabId that links it to the corresponding tab-content.item.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

props.name: tabId
props.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the tab to its content defined by the tab-content.item block.

props.name: label
props.description: Defines the tab's text label.

props.name: defaultActiveTab
props.description: Defines the item as the default active tab.

description: Flexible alternative to tab-list.item. Defines the rendering for a given tab and also accepts any array of blocks as its children.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

props.name: tabId
props.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the tab to a given content defined by the tab-content.item block.

description: Defines the list of content to be rendered in each tab. Only accepts tab-content.item as a child block.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

description: Defines the content panel associated with a specific tab in the tab-layout component.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

props.name: tabId
props.description: Tab ID of your choosing. Used to match the content to a given tab defined by tab-list.item or tab-list.item.children blocks.

description: Layout block that shows or hides child content based on user interaction (disclosure/accordion pattern).

props.name: initialVisibility
props.description: Controls whether the content is displayed (visible) or hidden by default when the page loads.

props.name: animated
props.description: When true, enables animations and adds data-* attributes to the content element for CSS-driven transitions.

description: Trigger element for the disclosure-layout. Renders a clickable element that shows or hides the disclosure content. Supports custom HTML tags and separate blocks for show/hide states.

props.name: Show
props.description: Name of the block rendered when the component is in the 'show content' state.

props.name: Hide
props.description: Name of the block rendered when the component is in the 'hide content' state.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML tag to be applied to the component when rendered on the UI.

props.name: children
props.description: Name of the block rendered when no blocks are declared in the Show or Hide props.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block identifier used to apply custom CSS classes via the blockClass handle.

description: Block that declares the content to be revealed when the disclosure trigger is activated.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID defined by you that will be used in CSS customizations.

description: Optional block that renders chevrons or other UI elements that change appearance based on the disclosure open/closed state.

props.name: Show
props.description: Name of the block that will be rendered when prompted to show the content.

props.name: Hide
props.description: Name of the block that will be rendered when prompted to hide the content.

description: Groups multiple disclosure-layout blocks and controls how many can be open simultaneously.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Defines how many disclosure-layout blocks can have their content displayed at a time: one (only one open at a time) or many (multiple can be open simultaneously).

description: Wraps multiple disclosure-trigger blocks for coordinated show/hide behavior across a disclosure-layout-group.

props.name: Show
props.description: Name of the block that will be rendered when prompted to show the content.

props.name: Hide
props.description: Name of the block that will be rendered when prompted to hide the content.

props.name: as
props.description: HTML tag to be applied to the component when rendered on the UI.

props.name: children
props.description: Name of the block that will be rendered if no blocks are declared in the Show or Hide props.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID defined by you that will be used in CSS customizations.

description: Block that wraps the element which triggers the modal to open. Supports click, page load, or session-based load triggers.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Defines whether the modal is triggered by user click, page load, or page load once per session.

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Store event ID that triggers the modal-trigger block and opens the modal-layout blocks on the interface.

props.name: customPixelEventName
props.description: Store event name that triggers the modal-trigger block, e.g. 'addToCart' or 'removeFromCart'.

description: Modal component that renders a modal dialog overlay, triggered by a trigger block or custom pixel events.

props.name: scroll
props.description: Defines how users should scroll the modal.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique block ID used for CSS customizations.

props.name: disableEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Defines whether the modal should be closed when pressing the Esc key.

props.name: fullScreen
props.description: Defines whether the modal should fill the whole screen (responsive).

props.name: backdrop
props.description: Defines whether the modal will have a clickable backdrop or none (responsive).

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Store event ID that triggers the modal-layout block.

props.name: customPixelEventName
props.description: Store event name that triggers the modal-layout block.

description: Header section of a VTEX IO modal, optionally rendering a close button with configurable icon size.

props.name: showCloseButton
props.description: Defines whether the close icon button should be rendered in the modal header (true) or not (false).

props.name: iconCloseSize
props.description: Size (in pixels) of the close icon button in the modal header.

description: Defines how the modal content will be rendered through its children blocks. Preferably used alongside modal-header to create a modal with a header and footer.
Logical block that only renders its child blocks, which in turn render call-to-action buttons inside the modal. Has no configurable props of its own.
Button block that closes the modal when used inside modal-actions. Renders a close button with a configurable label.

props.name: label
props.description: Defines the text rendered in the close button. Default depends on the store's language (Cancel, Cancelar).

description: Drawer block from vtex.store-drawer — a sliding panel component that can be triggered by user interaction or store events.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Defines the maximum width of the open drawer.

props.name: isFullWidth
props.description: Controls whether the open drawer should occupy the full available width.

props.name: slideDirection
props.description: Controls the sliding animation direction when the drawer opens.

props.name: backdropMode
props.description: Controls whether the backdrop should be displayed when the drawer is open.

props.name: renderingStrategy
props.description: Determines whether child content renders on interaction (lazy) or on page load (eager).

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Defines the store event ID responsible for triggering the drawer to automatically open on the interface.

props.name: customPixelEventName
props.description: Store event name (e.g., 'addToCart') that triggers automatic drawer opening.

description: Block that wraps the trigger element (e.g. a button or icon) responsible for opening the Drawer component.

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Defines the event ID to be sent whenever users interact with the Drawer component.

description: Layout block used to customize the header of the Drawer, which contains the close button. Accepts children blocks (drawer-close-button must be included). No configurable props are documented in the official VTEX IO documentation (https://github.com/vtex-apps/drawer).
Button used to close the drawer. Supports icon size, icon type, and optional text label.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the icon inside the button.

props.name: type
props.description: Defines the type of the icon.

props.name: text
props.description: Defines the text inside the button. The icon will not be rendered if text is defined.

description: Layout block for search result pages. Its child variants (search-result-layout.desktop, search-result-layout.mobile, search-not-found-layout) share these props.

props.name: hiddenFacets
props.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

props.name: showFacetQuantity
props.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name on the filter-navigator.v3 block.

props.name: showFacetTitle
props.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section on the filter-navigator.v3 block.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique block ID used for CSS customization.

props.name: trackingId
props.description: ID used by Google Analytics to track store metrics based on the Search Result block.

props.name: mobileLayout
props.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed to users on mobile layout.

props.name: defaultGalleryLayout
props.description: Determines the default name of the gallery layout on the search results page. Required when the gallery block explicitly defines several layouts.

props.name: thresholdForFacetSearch
props.description: Specifies the minimum number of facets that must be displayed for the search bar to appear. Declaring 0 always shows the search bar.

props.name: preventRouteChange
props.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, changing only the URL query string rather than the entire URL.

props.name: showShippingMethodFacet
props.description: Determines whether Shipping filters should be displayed or not.

description: Block used to display search results in templates that don't fetch Search context (e.g., Home). Accepts a querySchema prop to define and execute custom search queries.

props.name: querySchema
props.description: Defines the custom search query to be executed. Contains fields like queryField, mapField, maxItemsPerPage, orderByField, etc.

props.name: queryField
props.description: Query string of the search URL that defines the results to fetch in the custom query (inside querySchema). Requires mapField to be set.

props.name: mapField
props.description: Search URL's map parameter to define which results to fetch in the custom query (inside querySchema). Requires queryField to be set.

props.name: maxItemsPerPage
props.description: Maximum number of items per search page. Maximum allowed value is 50.

props.name: orderByField
props.description: Determines the order products follow when displayed.

props.name: hideUnavailableItems
props.description: Determines whether the search result should hide unavailable items (true) or not (false).

props.name: facetsBehavior
props.description: Defines the filters' behavior. Dynamic restricts results by selected filters; Static keeps all filters visible.

props.name: skusFilter
props.description: Refines the SKUs returned for each product in the query.

props.name: simulationBehavior
props.description: Defines whether the search data will be up-to-date (default) or fetched using the cache (skip).

props.name: installmentCriteria
props.description: Defines which price to display when different installments are available.

props.name: excludedPaymentSystems
props.description: List of payment systems not to consider when displaying installment options to users.

props.name: includedPaymentSystems
props.description: List of payment systems to consider when displaying installment options to users.

description: Layout block for displaying search results on desktop. Controls facets, gallery layout, tracking, and routing behavior.

props.name: hiddenFacets
props.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

props.name: showFacetQuantity
props.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name.

props.name: showFacetTitle
props.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique block identifier used for CSS customization.

props.name: trackingId
props.description: ID to be used in Google Analytics to track store metrics from the search results.

props.name: mobileLayout
props.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed to users using a mobile layout.

props.name: defaultGalleryLayout
props.description: Determines the default gallery layout name displayed on the search results page.

props.name: thresholdForFacetSearch
props.description: Minimum number of facets that must be displayed before a search bar appears in the filter navigator.

props.name: preventRouteChange
props.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, preventing route changes.

props.name: showShippingMethodFacet
props.description: Determines whether shipping method filters should be displayed on the search results page.

description: Layout block for rendering search result pages on mobile devices. Shares the same props as search-result-layout.desktop and search-not-found-layout.

props.name: hiddenFacets
props.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search result page.

props.name: showFacetQuantity
props.description: Whether filter result amounts are displayed beside filter names.

props.name: showFacetTitle
props.description: Whether the facet title appears in the selected filters section.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique block ID used as a handle for CSS customization.

props.name: trackingId
props.description: ID used for Google Analytics tracking of the search result block.

props.name: mobileLayout
props.description: Controls how the search results page displays on mobile layout, with mode1 and mode2 options (normal, small, inline).

props.name: defaultGalleryLayout
props.description: Name of the default gallery layout to be used; must match the name prop of the desired layout.

props.name: thresholdForFacetSearch
props.description: Minimum number of facets required for a search bar to be displayed in the filter navigator.

props.name: preventRouteChange
props.description: Keeps page customizations when filters are applied, preventing route changes.

props.name: showShippingMethodFacet
props.description: Whether shipping method filters are displayed on the search result page.

description: Layout block displayed when a search returns no results. Shares the same props as search-result-layout.desktop and search-result-layout.mobile.

props.name: hiddenFacets
props.description: Indicates which filters should be hidden on the search results page.

props.name: showFacetQuantity
props.description: Determines whether the resulting amount in each filter should appear beside its name.

props.name: showFacetTitle
props.description: Determines whether the facet title should appear on the selected filters section.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique identifier used as a handle for CSS customization.

props.name: trackingId
props.description: ID used by Google Analytics to track search result page metrics.

props.name: mobileLayout
props.description: Controls how the search results page is displayed on mobile layout.

props.name: defaultGalleryLayout
props.description: Determines the default gallery layout name when multiple gallery layouts are available.

props.name: thresholdForFacetSearch
props.description: Minimum number of facets that must be displayed for the search bar to appear in the filter panel.

props.name: preventRouteChange
props.description: Keeps page customizations even when the user applies new filters, preventing route changes.

props.name: showShippingMethodFacet
props.description: Determines whether Shipping Method filters should be displayed.

description: Decides, behind the scenes, which block to display: either the `gallery` block (if products are found) or the `not-found` block (if selected filters lead to an empty search results page). Both `gallery` and `not-found` must be declared as its children. This block has no configurable props documented in the official documentation.
Enables mobile users to switch between the available layout modes. This block receives no props and uses gallery-layout-option blocks as children.
Renders the product list on the search results page, supporting multiple layout configurations and custom product summaries.

props.name: layouts
props.description: Arranges and displays items on the search results page, supporting multiple layout options with name, component, and itemsPerRow settings.

props.name: customSummaryInterval
props.description: Defines the item interval at which the Gallery should render a custom product-summary block alongside the other items.

props.name: CustomSummary
props.description: Defines a block to render according to the interval defined by customSummaryInterval.

props.name: preferredSKU
props.description: Controls which SKU will be initially selected in the product summary when the product has multiple SKUs.

description: Logical block that allows users to switch between the available gallery layouts. Receives no props and expects gallery-layout-option blocks as children.
Defines a layout option button rendered inside the gallery-layout-switcher block. The name prop must match the layout name declared in the parent gallery block's layouts prop.

props.name: name
props.description: Specifies the name of the layout option. Must match the value passed to the `name` prop in the gallery block's layouts configuration.

description: Block that renders a "not found" message when a search returns no products. It must be declared as a child of search-not-found-layout. The component has no configurable props exposed at the theme block level — content and search term are derived internally from SearchPageContext.
Renders the search filters (facets) navigation panel. Supports responsive layout, collapsible filters, mobile drawer, price range slider, and custom facet ordering.

props.name: categoryFiltersMode
props.description: Controls whether category filters use href attributes with category URLs (href) or HTML divs with role=link (default).

props.name: layout
props.description: Specifies if the layout is responsive or fixed to desktop.

props.name: maxItemsDepartment
props.description: Maximum number of department items shown before a See more button appears.

props.name: maxItemsCategory
props.description: Maximum number of category items shown before a See more button appears.

props.name: initiallyCollapsed
props.description: Makes filters start in collapsed state (true) or open (false).

props.name: openFiltersMode
props.description: Controls how many filters can be open simultaneously.

props.name: filtersTitleHtmlTag
props.description: HTML tag used for filter titles.

props.name: scrollToTop
props.description: Scroll behavior when a facet is selected.

props.name: truncateFilters
props.description: Shortens filter lists with more than 10 options, adding a See more button.

props.name: closeOnOutsideClick
props.description: Closes the filter navigator when clicking outside it (works with openFiltersMode: one).

props.name: appliedFiltersOverview
props.description: Shows or hides the applied filters overview section.

props.name: totalProductsOnMobile
props.description: Displays or hides the total product count on mobile.

props.name: fullWidthOnMobile
props.description: Uses full screen width for the filter navigator on mobile devices.

props.name: navigationTypeOnMobile
props.description: Mobile navigation style: full page overlay or collapsible panel.

props.name: updateOnFilterSelectionOnMobile
props.description: Updates search results immediately on filter selection on mobile.

props.name: drawerDirectionMobile
props.description: Direction from which the filter drawer opens on mobile.

props.name: showClearByFilter
props.description: Shows a clear button next to individual filter names.

props.name: showClearAllFiltersOnDesktop
props.description: Displays a button to reset all applied filters on desktop.

props.name: priceRangeLayout
props.description: Price range filter display style: slider only or slider with input fields.

props.name: facetOrdering
props.description: Custom sorting rules for filters/facets ordering.

props.name: showQuantityBadgeOnMobile
props.description: Shows a badge indicating the number of active filters on mobile.

description: Renders a dropdown button with sorting options for search results. Documented under the order-by block section, applicable to order-by.v2.

props.name: specificationOptions
props.description: Indicates which sorting options by specification will be displayed. Only works for stores using vtex.search-resolver@1.x.

props.name: hiddenOptions
props.description: Indicates which sorting options will be hidden. Accepts an array of sorting option string values.

props.name: showOrderTitle
props.description: Determines whether the selected order value (e.g. Relevance) is displayed (true) or not (false).

description: Displays the total number of products found for that search. Uses context from the search page to render the count with a customizable message template.

props.name: message
props.description: Custom message ID (i18n key) used to display the total products count. Supports ICU message format with {recordsFiltered} variable.

description: Displays a title for the performed search. The component derives the title from the current search context (breadcrumb + query map) and renders it as an h1 element. No user-configurable props are exposed in the official documentation or block schema.
Renders a 'Show more' button that loads the next search results page. Does not render if there is no next page.

props.name: htmlElementForButton
props.description: Specifies which HTML element displays for the Show more button component. Use 'a' for an anchor element with href and rel attributes, or 'button' for a standard button element.

description: Bloco que exibe um botão para carregar a página anterior de resultados de busca. Não renderiza quando o usuário está na primeira página.

props.name: htmlElementForButton
props.description: Specifies which HTML element displays for the Show previous button component. Use `a` to render an anchor element with href and rel attributes, or `button` to render a button element.

description: Displays the product count per search results page. When declared, this block does not require any props.
Shows a progress bar of search results. When declared, this block does not need any props.
Botão de fechar exibido no canto superior direito da sidebar de filtros mobile, permitindo ao usuário dispensar o painel de filtros.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the close button icon.

props.name: type
props.description: Visual style type of the close button icon.

description: Renders the autocomplete result list with top searches, search history, suggested terms, and suggested products.

props.name: maxTopSearches
props.description: Maximum number of terms in the top searches list.

props.name: maxHistory
props.description: Maximum number of terms in the search history list.

props.name: maxSuggestedProducts
props.description: Maximum number of suggested products.

props.name: maxSuggestedTerms
props.description: Maximum number of suggested terms.

props.name: autocompleteWidth
props.description: Autocomplete width as a number between 0 and 100.

props.name: productLayout
props.description: Defines the product layout in the suggested products list.

props.name: hideTitles
props.description: If true, all section titles will be hidden.

props.name: historyFirst
props.description: If true, the Search History list will be prioritized over other lists.

props.name: customBreakpoints
props.description: Specifies the maximum number of suggested products per responsive breakpoint.

props.name: simulationBehavior
props.description: Use 'skip' for faster searches without fetching latest prices and promotions.

props.name: customPage
props.description: Defines a custom page to be used for autocomplete links.

props.name: orderBy
props.description: Controls the sorting order of suggested products. Invalid values default to relevance-based sorting.

description: Displays a banner configured in the VTEX search/merchandising settings, matched by area name.

props.name: area
props.description: Indicates the area. It must match the area configured in the banner.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Assigns a custom CSS class to the banner container element.

props.name: horizontalAlignment
props.description: Defines the horizontal alignment for the banner.

description: Component that suggests a possible misspelling correction for the current search query. It has no configurable props — all data is retrieved internally via the SearchPageContext and a GraphQL correction query.
Displays search term suggestions related to the current query, with optional custom page routing for suggestion links.

props.name: customPage
props.description: Defines a custom page to the link of a suggestion. Example: store.search.custom.

description: Renders a list of product summaries using list context, supporting filtering, sorting, and SKU control.

props.name: category
props.description: Category ID of the listed items. For subcategories, use '/' as separator (e.g. '1/2/3').

props.name: specificationFilters
props.description: Specification filters of the listed items, each with id and value fields.

props.name: collection
props.description: Filter items by collection ID.

props.name: orderBy
props.description: Sort order of the listed items.

props.name: hideUnavailableItems
props.description: Hides unavailable items. Treated as true when Delivery Promise is enabled.

props.name: maxItems
props.description: Maximum number of items to be fetched.

props.name: skusFilter
props.description: Controls which SKUs are returned for each product in the query.

props.name: installmentCriteria
props.description: Controls the price displayed when different installment options are available.

props.name: listName
props.description: Name of the list used in Google Analytics events.

props.name: preferredSKU
props.description: Controls which SKU is pre-selected in the product summary.

description: Bloco principal do Product Summary app, contendo os blocos filhos necessários para exibir resumos de produtos nas lojas.

props.name: priceBehavior
props.description: Determina se o componente deve buscar o preço mais atualizado (`async`) ou usar o preço padrão (`default`).

props.name: trackListName
props.description: Determina se o componente deve enviar o nome da lista para a página do produto quando o product summary é clicado.

props.name: sponsoredBadgeLabel
props.description: Texto exibido na tag 'Sponsored' de produtos patrocinados, quando aplicável.

props.name: sponsoredBadgePosition
props.description: Define a posição da tag 'Sponsored' de produtos patrocinados, quando aplicável.

description: Renders the list of attachment/assembly options (added and removed) for a product in the summary context. Driven entirely by ProductSummaryContext with no configurable props.
Renders the brand of the product. Deprecated in favor of ProductBrand from vtex.store-components.

props.name: displayMode
props.description: Whether the brand should be displayed as a logo or as text.

props.name: fallbackToText
props.description: Whether it should display the brand name as text if there is no logo available.

props.name: excludeBrands
props.description: List of brand names or IDs that should be hidden.

props.name: height
props.description: Height (in pixels) of the brand logo.

props.name: logoWithLink
props.description: Whether the brand logo should be wrapped in a link.

description: Buy button displayed in the product summary, allowing users to add products to cart or be redirected to checkout directly from the product shelf.

props.name: isOneClickBuy
props.description: Controls whether users are redirected to Checkout after clicking the Buy Button.

props.name: buyButtonText
props.description: Allows custom text to replace the default Buy Button label.

props.name: displayBuyButton
props.description: Controls the visibility mode of the Buy Button.

props.name: customToastURL
props.description: Sets a redirect destination for the notification displayed when items are added to cart.

props.name: buyButtonBehavior
props.description: Determines user navigation behavior on Buy Button click.

description: Block that renders the product description text, truncated to a configurable maximum character length.

props.name: descriptionMaxSize
props.description: Maximum number of characters to display before truncating the product description with '...'.

props.name: classes
props.description: Custom CSS class overrides for the available CSS handles (e.g. `description`). Follows the CssHandlesTypes.CustomClasses interface.

description: Renders the product image in the product summary component, supporting badges, hover images, and responsive sizing.

props.name: showBadge
props.description: Determines whether a discount badge is displayed on the product image.

props.name: badgeText
props.description: Specifies the text for the discount badge display.

props.name: showCollections
props.description: Controls collection badge visibility. Deprecated — use Product Highlights instead.

props.name: displayMode
props.description: Defines the Product Summary Image display mode.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Designates a placeholder image URL.

props.name: mainImageLabel
props.description: Matches catalog image labels to determine the primary display image.

props.name: hoverImageLabel
props.description: Selects the hover image via label matching. Deprecated — use hoverImage instead.

props.name: hoverImage
props.description: Defines the criteria that should determine the hover image based on the product images.

props.name: height

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Establishes maximum height when width/height are configured (responsive object).

props.name: fetchpriority
props.description: Sets the fetch priority hint for the product image resource.

description: Renders the product name inside a Product Summary component.

props.default: { showProductReference: false, showBrandName: false, showSku: false }

Renders the price information of a product in the product summary context, including list price, selling price, installments, and discount value.

props.name: showListPrice

props.name: showInstallments

props.name: showDiscountValue
props.description: Set discount value's visibility

props.name: showLabels
props.description: Set pricing labels' visibility

props.name: labelSellingPrice

props.name: labelListPrice
props.description: Text of the list price's label

props.name: showBorders
props.description: Set product's borders visibility

description: Displays a quantity selector for a product inside the product summary shelf. Must be declared as a child of product-summary.shelf.

props.name: warningQuantityThreshold
props.description: Displays the quantity of remaining items in stock if the available quantity is less than or equal to the value given to this property.

props.name: showUnit
props.description: Whether the unit of measurement should be displayed (true) or not (false).

props.name: size
props.description: Preset size values for font-size and padding.

props.description: Whether a label should be displayed (true) or not (false).

props.description: Defines how the quantity selector should initially behave: stepper (input field with adjustment buttons) or dropdown (predefined-quantity list).

props.name: quantitySelectorStep

props.description: The distance (px) that each item should be from the viewport at the time of its rendering.

description: Renders the product name as a link using item context. No configurable props — all data comes from context hooks (useItemContext, useRuntime). Confirmed by official docs at https://developers.vtex.com/docs/apps/vtex.product-list and source code at https://github.com/vtex-apps/product-list/blob/master/react/ProductName.tsx.

description: Bloco que exibe o preço do produto na lista de produtos do carrinho.

description: Displays availability messages for a product based on its stock quantity, supporting low-stock and high-stock message thresholds.

props.description: Message text displayed when in-stock quantity is lower than the threshold. Must include {quantity} in the string to display the actual stock quantity.

props.name: highStockMessage
props.description: Message text displayed when in-stock quantity is greater than or equal to the threshold value.

description: Interface block (Noop component) que serve como ponto de extensão para apps de review. Não possui props configuráveis próprios — a implementação real e seus props ficam no app que extende esta interface (ex: vtex.reviews-and-ratings).

Interface block that provides an extensible contract for product review implementations. Concrete review apps (e.g. vtex.reviews-and-ratings) depend on this interface and extend it. The interface itself defines no configurable props — the official documentation page (developers.vtex.com/docs/apps/vtex.product-review-interfaces) and the GitHub repository contain no props table for this block.

Extensible interface block for a product questions and answers section. This block is a Noop placeholder that third-party review/Q&A apps extend to inject their own implementation into the store. No props are defined at the interface level.

Renders the average rating and total review count for the current product. This block is an abstract interface (Noop component) in vtex.product-review-interfaces — concrete behavior is implemented by review apps such as vtex.reviews-and-ratings. No block-level props are documented or defined; all display settings are configured at the app level via Admin settings.

description: Displays the attachment/assembly option item image. Reads image URL and name from context; has no configurable props.
