props.description: Defines a custom text message to be displayed on the button when a product is unavailable (automatic translation follows store default language).

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Defines the id for the event that the button will send upon user interaction.

description: Renders an HTML iframe element inside a VTEX IO storefront page, supporting both static and dynamic (URL-parameter-based) source addresses.

props.name: src
props.description: Source address the iframe should render.

props.name: dynamicSrc
props.description: iframe src with dynamic parameters from the page URL enclosed in '{}'.

props.name: width
props.description: Width attribute of the iframe.

props.name: height
props.description: Height attribute of the iframe.

props.name: title
props.description: title attribute of the iframe.

props.name: allow
props.description: allow attribute of the iframe (e.g. permissions policy).

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute of the iframe.

props.name: className
props.description: class attribute of the iframe.

props.name: onLoad
props.description: onLoad attribute of the iframe.

props.name: srcAccount
props.description: Object with account name and src, used for multi-account iframe source resolution.

description: Renders an iframe with a dynamic src built from URL query parameters, enabling embedded external content that adapts to the current page URL.

props.name: dynamicSrc
props.description: iframe src with dynamic parameters from page URL enclosed in '{}'

props.name: width
props.description: Width attribute of the iframe

props.name: height
props.description: Height attribute of the iframe

props.name: title
props.description: title attribute of the iframe

props.name: allow
props.description: allow attribute of the iframe

props.name: id
props.description: ID attribute of the iframe

props.name: className
props.description: class attribute of the iframe

props.name: onLoad
props.description: onLoad attribute of the iframe

props.name: srcAccount
props.description: Object with account name and src, enabling conditional source URLs based on account names (e.g. production vs QA)

description: Button that adds a product to the wishlist, rendering a heart icon on product shelves and product pages.

props.name: toastURL
props.description: Changes the link of the toast message shown after adding a product to the wishlist.

description: Provides product data to build the /wishlist page shared with the My Account page.

props.name: showViewEmptyList
props.description: Shows a custom view if no product has been added to the wishlist.

description: Container block that renders a custom view when the wishlist has no products. It has no configurable props of its own; it accepts children blocks (e.g. rich-text) and is enabled via showViewEmptyList on the parent list-context.wishlist block.
Link para a seção de Wishlist na página Minha Conta, permitindo customizar o rótulo exibido no menu.

props.name: label
props.description: Changes the section menu label on the My Account page.

description: Renders the Wishlist page inside the My Account section, optionally wrapping content in a titled ContentWrapper.

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed in the My Account page header via ContentWrapper. If empty or not set, the page is rendered without the wrapper.

props.name: namespace
props.description: CSS namespace passed to the ContentWrapper component.

description: Interface block for the /wishlist route that renders the wishlist custom page. The official documentation does not define any first-level props for this block; it acts as a route container composed of child blocks (list-context.wishlist, flex-layout, etc.).

Renders a paginated list of reviews for the product being viewed, as well as a form for the shopper to add a new review. This block does not expose configurable props at the block level — all configuration is managed via the app-level settings in the VTEX admin (allowAnonymousReviews, requireApproval, useLocation, defaultOpen, showGraph, etc.).

Renders the average rating and total review count for the product being viewed. This block accepts no block-level props — all display behavior (show empty stars, show total reviews count, show Add Review button) is controlled through the app's admin settings (AppSettings via GraphQL), not through theme block props.

Exibe a avaliação média do produto em formato inline, destinado ao uso em prateleiras de produto (product shelves). Não expõe props configuráveis no nível do bloco — o comportamento é controlado pelas configurações do app no Admin.
Breadcrumb block for product detail pages, displaying the navigation path based on the product's category tree.

props.name: showOnMobile
props.description: Determines whether the breadcrumb should also be displayed on mobile devices.

props.name: homeIconSize
props.description: Controls the size property of the IconHome icon rendered at the start of the breadcrumb.

props.name: caretIconSize
props.description: Controls the size property of the IconCaret separator icon rendered between breadcrumb items.

description: Renders child blocks conditionally based on a set of evaluated conditions within a context (product, binding, category, telemarketing). Never used directly — always via a context variant such as condition-layout.product.

props.name: conditions
props.description: List of condition objects to be evaluated; each object defines subject, arguments (v2) or verb/object (v1), and toBe.

props.name: matchType
props.description: Determines how many conditions must be satisfied for the layout to render: all, any, or none.

props.name: Then
props.description: Block ID to render when the conditions are satisfied; if not provided, child blocks are rendered instead.

props.name: Else
props.description: Block ID to render when the conditions are not satisfied.

description: Block that renders a location input control (postal code setter) in the store header, enabling the Delivery Promise feature by capturing the shopper's location.

props.name: required
props.description: When true, opens a non-dismissible postal code modal until a valid code is set; when false, uses the popover flow.

props.name: mode
props.description: Display mode of the location setter control.

props.name: showLocationDetectorButton
props.description: Shows a button that uses the browser geolocation API to suggest the postal code automatically.

description: Displays a selector for the shopper to choose between delivery or pickup shipping methods, complementing the location setter in the storefront header.

props.name: required
props.description: When true, the shipping method modal cannot be dismissed until a method is selected after a postal code is entered.

props.name: mode
props.description: Controls the display mode of the shipping method selector trigger.

description: Optional block that allows shoppers to select which pickup point to use after a location is set. Should be paired with shopper-location-setter in the header.

props.name: mode
props.description: Display mode for the pickup point selector UI.

description: Displays product-summary badges driven by delivery promise data. Has no content schema; relies on ProductSummaryContext and useDeliveryPromiseState for delivery information.
Namespace container for the Flex Layout app. Should never be used directly — use flex-layout.row or flex-layout.col instead. Has no configurable props of its own.

Base interface block that creates a list context to be extended by other apps (e.g., list-context.product-list, list-context.image-list). It has no configurable props of its own; all customization is done in the extending block or in list-context-renderer.
Renders a list of navigation links in the store menu. Each link can point to an internal page or an external URL.

props.name: links
props.description: Array of link objects to be displayed in the menu, each with text, route, and position configuration.

description: Accordion-style submenu container that collapses/expands its children based on the isOpen state. Used inside menu-item blocks on mobile/responsive layouts.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: Controls whether the accordion submenu is expanded (true) or collapsed (false).

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Custom CSS class handle suffix used to override default CSS handles for this block instance.

description: Layout column container used inside a submenu block to group menu items into columns. It has no configurable props — it accepts only children via block composition.
Minicart block that displays a shopping cart icon with a drawer, popup, or inline cart view.

props.name: variation
props.description: Minicart behavior when rendered.

props.name: drawerSlideDirection
props.description: Slide direction for the drawer Minicart opening.

props.name: linkVariationUrl
props.description: Link associated with the link Minicart variation.

props.name: maxDrawerWidth
props.description: Maximum width in pixels for the drawer Minicart when opened.

props.name: openOnHover
props.description: Indicates whether the popup Minicart should open when the user hovers over it.

props.name: quantityDisplay
props.description: Controls whether the quantity badge is shown even when the cart is empty.

props.name: itemCountMode
props.description: Determines how the item count in the cart badge is calculated.

props.name: backdropMode
props.description: Controls whether a backdrop is displayed when the drawer Minicart is opened.

props.name: customPixelEventId
props.description: Store event ID that triggers the minicart to automatically open.

props.name: customPixelEventName
props.description: Store event name that triggers the minicart to automatically open.

props.name: classes
props.description: Used to override default CSS handles via React component import (CustomCSSClasses).

description: Displays a button that, when clicked, opens a modal with its children blocks rendered inside. Deprecated in favor of vtex.modal-layout.

props.name: centered
props.description: Set to true if the modal component should be centered on screen.

props.name: closeOnEsc
props.description: Set to true if the modal should close when the Esc key is pressed.

props.name: closeOnOverlayClick
props.description: Set to true if the modal should close when clicking outside the modal area.

props.name: showCloseIcon
props.description: Set to true if the modal should display a close icon button.

props.name: buttonLabel
props.description: Label text displayed on the button that opens the modal.

props.name: buttonClass
props.description: Extra Tachyons classes to apply to the button container.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Unique class name appended to the block's CSS classes for custom styling.

description: Renders the takeaway packages section of an order confirmation page, displaying takeaway parcels and their products. Receives no configurable props — all data is consumed from OrderContext via the useOrder() hook.

Wrapper block that defines which element triggers the overlay content. Not rendered visually itself — it accepts children blocks, one of which acts as the visible trigger that opens the overlay layout.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Defines whether the popover-layout will be opened by click or by hovering over the trigger element.

description: Block that renders a content overlay positioned relative to its trigger component, supporting dropdown, select, or tooltip patterns.

props.name: placement
props.description: Defines the overlay content placement relative to the trigger component positioning, with automatic fallback if space is unavailable.

props.name: scrollBehavior
props.description: Controls overlay behavior during page scroll: lock page scrolling, close the overlay on scroll, or remain unaffected.

props.name: backdrop
props.description: Determines whether a backdrop overlay is displayed when the content is rendered; a visible backdrop closes the overlay on click.

props.name: showArrow
props.description: Controls whether an arrow pointing toward the trigger component is displayed on the overlay.

props.name: offsets
props.description: Positions the overlay relative to the trigger using skidding (side-by-side offset in px) and distance (gap in px, negative values cause overlap).

description: Interface block that provides an extensible placeholder for wishlist/bookmark functionality. It renders a Noop component and is designed to be extended by theme or wishlist apps. It has no configurable props.

Page-level container block that assembles the product details customizer page. It is a structural template (mapped to the index component) that composes required child blocks such as product-name, product-images, product-price, buy-button, sku-selector, and others. It has no configurable props of its own.
Block that assembles the product details page, configuring product images, price, name, specifications, and highlights display areas.

props.name: displayVertically
props.description: Whether to display the preview images vertically or not.

props.name: showSpecificationsTab
props.description: Whether to display the product specification in tab mode or not.

props.name: price
props.description: Configures the product price area (showListPrice, showLabels, showInstallments, showSavings, labelSellingPrice).

props.name: name
props.description: Configures the product name area (showProductReference, showBrandName, showSku).

props.name: showHighlights
props.description: Whether to show the highlights of the product.

props.name: defaultHighlight
props.description: Indicates whether the highlight group will contain all product properties or only a typed group entry.

props.name: highlightGroup
props.description: Defines the highlight group configuration for the product.

props.name: showSpecifications
props.description: Whether to show the specifications of the product.

props.name: specificationGroups
props.description: Defines whether all specifications or a subset will be displayed.

props.name: viewMode
props.description: Defines the current view mode for the specifications display.

props.name: typeSpecifications
props.description: Indicates which specifications will be displayed for the product.

description: Displays a quantity selector that allows users to specify how many units of the displayed product they want before adding to cart, within a product details page context.

props.name: warningQuantityThreshold
props.description: Displays remaining stock count only when available quantity is less than or equal to this value; set to 0 to never show the warning.

description: Button that allows users to add products to a list (wishlist). The block is accepted by store.product but has no documented configurable props in the official VTEX IO developer portal for vtex.product-details.
Extension point block that accepts any component as a child within the product-add-to-list-button. Defined as a wildcard interface ("component": "*") with no configurable props of its own.
Renders the list of gift products associated with a promotion on the product page.

props.name: maxVisibleItems
props.description: Maximum number of gifts displayed at once; accepts a number (as string) or the value 'showAll' to display all available gifts.

description: Renders the available gifts in a list format and provides context for its child blocks (gift-name, gift-image, gift-description). No configurable props documented.
Renders the name of a gift product within the Product Gifts app, with options to link to the product page and choose between product name or SKU name.

props.name: linkToProductPage
props.description: Whether or not the gift-name block should be a link to the gift's product page.

props.name: nameType
props.description: Determines which name displays with the gift: the product name or the SKU name.

description: Renders the gift product image inside the product-gifts layout. If no imageLabel is defined, uses the first available image from the product SKU.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Gift image maximum width.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Gift image maximum height.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Gift image minimum width.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Gift image minimum height.

props.name: imageLabel
props.description: Label of the image variant that should be rendered; if not set, the first available SKU image is used.

description: Reads Catalog data regarding the product's gifts and renders a customizable text using ICU pattern with gift-related variables.

props.name: text
props.description: Translatable string (ICU pattern) with variables (exceedingItems, totalGifts, visibleItems) used to render gift-related text.

description: Renders the gift's description provided by the product-gift-list block. No configurable props are documented for this block.
Displays product highlight tags (collection, promotion, or teaser) on a product page, filtering or showing specific highlight names.

props.name: type
props.description: Specifies which category of product highlight to display: collection, promotion, or teaser (restricted promotions only).

props.name: filter
props.description: Controls which highlights are displayed or hidden by specifying inclusion/exclusion rules via highlightNames (array) and type (hide|show).

description: Renders a div HTML tag and its children blocks, used to display other components alongside highlight names with CSS customization support.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Block ID of your choosing to be used in CSS customization.

description: Renders a span HTML element with the product highlight name, supporting text customization, optional link, CSS customization via blockClass, and Site Editor customization via markers.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: The block ID you chose to be used for CSS customization.

props.name: message
props.description: Defines the block default text message to be rendered in the UI; supports ICU Message Format and the highlightName variable.

props.name: markers
props.description: IDs you chose to identify the block's rendered text message and customize it using the Admin Site Editor.

props.name: link
props.description: If set, wraps the highlight text in a link; supports interpolation of highlightText and highlightId variables (e.g. /collection/{highlightId}).

description: Displays a product identifier such as product reference, product ID, SKU EAN, or SKU reference ID on the storefront.

props.name: label
props.description: Controls how the label is displayed: use the default label, a custom text, or hide it entirely.

props.name: customLabel
props.description: Custom text used as the label when the label prop is set to 'custom'.

props.name: idField
props.description: Determines which product identifier type is displayed (item ID, product ID, product reference, SKU EAN, or SKU reference ID).

description: Displays a product identifier (such as product reference, product ID, SKU EAN, or SKU reference) inside a product summary context.

props.name: idField
props.description: Which product identifier field to display.

props.name: label
props.description: Controls the label text: show the default label, use a custom label, or hide it entirely.

props.name: customLabel
props.description: Custom label text to display when label is set to 'custom'.

description: Renders a manual price input for cart items, allowing overrides via a modal. Receives all data through React context (useItemContext) and has no configurable block-level props.

Renders the product specification values. Must be declared as a child of product-specification and expects product-specification-text as its children. No configurable props are documented for this block.

Main Product Summary block (product-summary.shelf) that provides the structure for the Product Summary component, used to display product information such as name, image, and price in contexts like shelves and search results.

props.name: priceBehavior
props.description: Determines whether the component should fetch the most up-to-date price asynchronously or use the default behavior.

props.name: trackListName
props.description: Controls whether the list name is sent to the product page when a product is clicked, enabling GTM productDetail event tracking.

props.name: sponsoredBadgeLabel
props.description: Text content displayed on the sponsored badge when the product is a sponsored result.

props.name: sponsoredBadgePosition
props.description: Defines the position of the sponsored badge on the product summary component.

description: A simple layout column container used inside product-summary.shelf that wraps child blocks; it has no configurable props of its own.

Flex layout variant of Product Summary that renders product information (image, name, price, etc.) in a flex container. Maps to the ProductSummaryCustom component and accepts children blocks for composable layouts.

props.name: priceBehavior
props.description: Controls whether the client requests the price simulation API for all sellers (async), only for the 1P seller (asyncOnly1P), or skips the API call (default).

props.name: trackListName
props.description: Whether the listName should be sent to product pages via querystring for analytics tracking.

props.name: sponsoredBadgePosition
props.description: Predefined position of the sponsored badge displayed on the product card, if applicable.

props.name: sponsoredBadgeLabel
props.description: Label text for the sponsored badge displayed on the product card.

props.name: placement
props.description: Indicates where this ProductSummary is being shown, used for analytics (e.g. 'search' or 'shelf').

props.name: classes
props.description: Custom CSS handles object to override default CSS handle classes (container, containerNormal, element, clearLink).

props.name: extraProductProps
props.description: Extra data attributes spread onto the section element; all keys must start with 'data-' (e.g. data-af-category).

description: A flex-grow spacer block with no configurable props. It renders an empty div that expands to fill available space in a flex container, used to push sibling blocks apart within product summary layouts.
Renders badges based on product specifications inside a product summary layout.

props.name: specificationGroupName
props.description: Name of the specification group in which the desired specifications are.

props.name: specificationName
props.description: Name of the specification to target; if empty, targets all specifications in the group.

props.name: visibleWhen
props.description: Displays the badge only when the specification has this exact matching value.

props.name: displayValue
props.description: Value displayed on the badge when the specification condition is met; accepts SPECIFICATION_NAME, SPECIFICATION_VALUE, or a custom string.

props.name: specificationsOptions
props.description: Array of Option objects to individually control display conditions for specific specifications.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Determines whether the group of specification badges is displayed vertically or horizontally.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Custom name appended to the component CSS classes for targeted styling.

description: Renders a button inside the product summary that allows users to add the product to a wishlist/list. It is a context-driven wrapper with no configurable props — product data is sourced internally from ProductSummaryContext.

Extension point block in vtex.product-summary that acts as a slot/placeholder for addon buttons (such as add-to-list from vtex.wish-list). It is defined with component "*" in interfaces.json, meaning it accepts any component. No configurable props are declared at the base block level in the official documentation.
Renders a static list of products in the Product Summary component without running a GraphQL query, receiving products directly via props.

props.name: products
props.description: Array of products to be rendered in the static list.

props.name: listName
props.description: Name of the list property sent in Google Analytics events.

props.name: preferredSKU
props.description: Controls which SKU will be initially selected in the product summary.

description: Container block that renders its children only when the current screen size matches the declared breakpoint variant (desktop, tablet, phone, mobile). Has no configurable props — behavior is entirely determined by which variant suffix is used in store/blocks.json.

Renders a paginated list of reviews for the product being viewed and a form for the customer to add a new review. The block has no configurable props — all settings are managed via the app's admin configuration (AppSettings) consumed internally through GraphQL.
Renders the average rating and total review count for the product being viewed on the product page (store.product). Behavior is controlled via app-level admin settings, not block-level props.
Displays the product average rating inline, intended for use in product shelves. The component has no configurable block-level props — all behavior is controlled by app-level settings.

Legacy structural container block for the search results page. Requires a gallery child block and allows filter-navigator, total-products, order-by, breadcrumb, not-found, search-title, rich-text, and search-products-progress-bar as children. Configurable props are exposed via the search-result-layout family of blocks (search-result-layout.desktop, search-result-layout.mobile, search-not-found-layout), not directly on this block. No first-level props are documented for the search-result block itself.

Displays a title for the performed search on the search results page. The block (mapped to SearchTitle component) has no user-configurable props documented in the official VTEX IO documentation; breadcrumb and wrapperClass are internal/injected props, not store/blocks.json-level props.
Renders a tabbed shelf of products, allowing multiple product lists organized into navigable tabs (up to 6 tabs).

props.name: isEnabled
props.description: Controls whether the tabbed shelf component is visible/enabled.

props.name: headline
props.description: Main heading text displayed above the tabbed shelf.

props.name: bottomText
props.description: Footer text displayed below the tabbed shelf.

props.name: tabs
props.description: Array of tab configuration objects (max 6), each with an id (category ID) and __editorItemTitle (tab label).

props.name: shelf
props.description: Shelf component configuration object, inheriting props from the shelf block schema.

props.name: buttonText
props.description: Label text for the call-to-action button displayed on the shelf.

props.name: buttunUrl
props.description: Navigation URL for the call-to-action button (note: original code contains this typo).

description: Renders a set of components that allow users to add their location and/or select a store for pickup, typically declared as a child of the store header block.

props.name: callToAction
props.description: Defines the type of overlay that opens when the page loads.

props.name: compactMode
props.description: When enabled, hides the button label and displays only the current location value.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Controls whether the modal can be dismissed without entering a postal code.

props.name: shippingSelection
props.description: Defines which shipping option selector is displayed (both delivery and pickup, or only pickup).

props.name: showLocationDetectorButton
props.description: When enabled, displays a geolocation button that automatically detects the user's current location and sets the postal code.

description: Abstract interface block for shop review forms. Defined as a Noop component with extensible: public — it is a placeholder with no configurable props; implementing apps (e.g. vtex.reviews-and-ratings) override this interface and may expose their own props.

Abstract interface block (Noop component) that serves as a public extensibility point for shop-level review badge widgets. It has no configurable props of its own; concrete props are defined by the implementing app (e.g., vtex.trustpilot's trustpilot-widget).

Abstract interface block (Noop component, extensible: public) that acts as a slot for merchant review summary implementations. It has no configurable props of its own — third-party apps implement this interface to render store-level review summaries.

Page-level home template block in vtex.store. Acts as a container that wraps the homepage with homeWrapper; all content customization is done via child blocks declared inside it. No user-facing configurable props.

Page template block for the account area (/account route). Acts as a container that requires the my-account block and wraps content with the challenge.profile block. Has no configurable props of its own.
Login block that renders the login button and handles authentication flows in the VTEX IO storefront.

props.name: optionsTitle
props.description: Text to entitle the login options.

props.name: emailAndPasswordTitle
props.description: Text to display the email-and-password option.

props.name: accessCodeTitle
props.description: Text to display the access-code option.

props.name: emailPlaceholder
props.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the email input.

props.name: passwordPlaceholder
props.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the password input.

props.name: acessCodePlaceholder
props.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the access code input.

props.name: showPasswordVerificationIntoTooltip
props.description: Whether a tooltip responsible for checking the password format should be shown.

props.name: showIconProfile
props.description: Whether the profile icon should be displayed on the Login component.

props.name: iconLabel
props.description: Text string to entitle the Login icon.

props.name: hideIconLabel
props.description: Whether the text string defined for the Login icon should be hidden.

props.name: labelClasses
props.description: Login icon's classnames.

props.name: providerPasswordButtonLabel
props.description: Text to be displayed as the password button label.

props.name: identifierPlaceholder
props.description: Text to be displayed as placeholder to the extension input.

props.name: invalidIdentifierError
props.description: Error message for invalid user identifier.

props.name: mirrorTooltipToRight
props.description: Whether the Login tooltip should open towards the right side.

props.name: logInButtonBehavior
props.description: Expected behavior of the Login component when clicked on.

props.name: accountOptionsButtonBehavior
props.description: Expected behavior of the My Account button when clicked on.

props.name: accountOptionLinks
props.description: Creates custom links to replace the default account page link.

props.name: termsAndConditions
props.description: Text to be displayed below the login options regarding terms and conditions.

props.name: hasGoogleOneTap
props.description: Whether Google's One-tap sign-up and auto sign-in solution should be enabled.

props.name: googleOneTapAlignment
props.description: Defines pop-up alignment for the Google One-tap login.

props.name: googleOneTapMarginTop
props.description: Defines the pop-up top margin for the Google One-tap login.

props.name: disabledEmailInputs
props.description: Whether user email editing should be allowed.

props.name: blockOAuthAutoRedirect
props.description: If true, login will not auto-redirect when only one OAuth provider is active.

description: Page template block for the Order Placed page. Acts as a top-level container that renders the order-placed child block; has no configurable props of its own.
Interface placeholder block (Noop) defined in vtex.product-review-interfaces. It has no configurable props of its own — it acts as an extensibility contract that third-party review apps implement.

Blog homepage route template provided by the vtex.wordpress-integration app. Acts as a page container that can be extended (e.g. store.blog-home#custom) to create additional custom blog pages; it has no directly configurable first-level props.
Page template block for the blog category route (/blog/category/:categoryslug_id). It is a route container with no configurable props of its own; content is composed via child blocks.

Page route template for individual blog post pages (path: /blog/post/:slug_id). It is a container block with no configurable props of its own — content is rendered by child blocks such as blog-post-container.wordpress and blog-post-details.wordpress-post-details.

Page-level template block for blog search results pages. Defined in vtex.store interfaces.json as a container that renders header.full before the page and requires blog-search-list as a child block. It has no configurable props of its own — configuration is done by composing child blocks inside it.
Page template block rendered when the server returns a 404 error; acts as a container for child blocks and has no configurable props of its own.

Layout slot/container block defined in vtex.store with component: "*". Acts as a named region in the store header layout with no configurable props of its own; content is provided by child blocks such as notification.bar.

Page template block used to define custom routes in a Store Theme app. It acts as a container with no first-level configurable props of its own; layout and content are composed entirely via child blocks declared in store/blocks.json and routed through store/routes.json.
Renders the autocomplete result list dropdown for the search bar, integrating with Downshift to display suggested search results as the user types.

props.name: attemptPageTypeSearch
props.description: Uses the input term to try to navigate to the proper page type (e.g. a department, a brand, a category) if true.

props.name: classes
props.description: Overrides default CSS handles for custom styling.

props.name: closeMenu
props.description: Function that closes the autocomplete dropdown menu (Downshift-related).

props.name: customSearchPageUrl
props.description: Template for a custom URL; accepts ${term} as placeholder to interpolate the searched term.

props.name: data
props.description: GraphQL data response containing the autocomplete results.

props.name: highlightedIndex
props.description: The index of the item that should be highlighted in the autocomplete list (Downshift-related).

props.name: getItemProps
props.description: Returns the props for every menu item element being rendered (Downshift-related).

props.name: getMenuProps
props.description: Returns the props for the ul or root element of the autocomplete menu (Downshift-related).

props.name: inputValue
props.description: The current search query text typed by the user.

props.name: onClearInput
props.description: Function that clears the search input field.

props.name: isOpen
props.description: Determines whether the autocomplete dropdown menu should be displayed.

description: Renders a high-quality image inside a modal zoom context for the Product Images block, with control over size, aspect ratio, and zoom behavior.

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio for the modal image display, using notation like 1:1 or 3:4.

props.name: defaultSize
props.description: Default image size in pixels used when rendering the high-quality image.

props.name: imageSizes
props.description: Array of pixel sizes used to build the responsive srcset attribute for the image.

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum rendering size in pixels for the high-quality image.

props.name: zoomFactor
props.description: Multiplier that sets how much the zoom increases the image size.

props.name: zoomMode
props.description: Defines the zoom interaction type applied to the high-quality image.

description: Renders a simple horizontal rule (hr) as a visual separator on product pages. This block is deprecated and has no configurable props.
Displays the current user's shipping address with configurable display options. Supports inline or bar layout variations.

props.name: variation
props.description: Layout variation: 'inline' renders address on a single line, 'bar' renders it as a block.

props.name: showStreet
props.description: Whether to display the street name in the address.

props.name: showCityAndState
props.description: Whether to display city and state in the address.

props.name: showPostalCode
props.description: Whether to display the postal code in the address.

props.name: showPrefix
props.description: Whether to display the address type prefix label (e.g. pickup/delivery).

props.name: showIfEmpty
props.description: Whether to render the component and show an 'Add address' option when no address exists.

props.name: showIfMasked
props.description: Whether to render the address string when it contains masked characters (asterisks).

description: Block not found in vtex.store-components official documentation or repository. No props are publicly documented for this block.
Displays a notification bar with a text message across the top of the store page.

props.name: content
props.description: Text to be displayed in the notification bar.

props.name: classes
props.description: Allows overriding default CSS handles when using this block as a React component.

description: Container block for the store footer layout. Acts as a pure composition wrapper that accepts child blocks (footer-row, social-networks, accepted-payment-methods, powered-by, etc.) with no configurable props of its own.
A layout row container for the store footer that renders children with optional full-width and color-inversion settings.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Define if the row should take the full width of its container.

props.name: inverted
props.description: Define if background and text colors should be inverted.

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Custom CSS class identifier used for styling overrides via CSS handles.

description: Simple deprecated spacer block that renders a flex-grow div to fill available horizontal space inside a footer row. It accepts no configurable props.

Base container block for form input variants in vtex.store-form. Defined as a no-operation component ("nop") that acts as a namespace for form-input.text, form-input.textarea, form-input.checkbox, form-input.radiogroup, form-input.dropdown, and form-input.upload. Has no configurable props of its own.
Top-level header container block that accepts header-layout.desktop and header-layout.mobile as children. Has no configurable props of its own.
Container block that composes the full store header by nesting header-layout.desktop and header-layout.mobile blocks. It has no configurable props of its own.
Container block that defines the Header layout for desktop and mobile devices through header-row blocks. It has no configurable props of its own.

Container block that defines the Header layout for desktop devices when in scroll mode. It is a variant of header-layout.desktop with no configurable props of its own — it acts as a composition host for header-row children blocks.

Device-specific mobile-scroll variant of the header layout container. Defined as an empty interface in store/interfaces.json, it inherits from header-layout with no additional configurable props of its own.

Renders a single image with link, loading strategy, fetch priority, and optional analytics/promotion tracking. Defined in store/interfaces.json referencing the Image component and app:vtex.store-image#/definitions/Image schema.

props.name: src
props.description: Image source URL (uses image-uploader widget in Site Editor).

props.name: alt
props.description: Alternative text for the image, used for accessibility.

props.name: title
props.description: Image title attribute shown on hover.

props.name: link
props.description: Object with url, noFollow, openNewTab, and title fields to link the image to a URL.

props.name: width
props.description: Image width in px or % (e.g. '100%' or '300px').

props.name: height
props.description: Image height in px or % (e.g. '200px').

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width constraint for the image.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height constraint for the image.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Minimum width constraint for the image.

props.name: minHeight
props.description: Minimum height constraint for the image.

props.name: srcSet
props.description: Responsive image sources for different viewport sizes.

props.name: sizes
props.description: Responsive image sizes descriptor used with srcSet.

props.name: loading
props.description: Native browser loading strategy for the image.

props.name: fetchpriority
props.description: Fetch priority hint to help the browser prioritize image loading.

props.name: preload
props.description: When true, adds a preload link tag to prioritize loading this image.

props.name: analyticsProperties
props.description: Whether to send promotion analytics events when the image is clicked.

props.name: promotionId
props.description: Promotion identifier sent in analytics events (requires analyticsProperties=provided).

props.name: promotionName
props.description: Promotion name sent in analytics events (requires analyticsProperties=provided).

props.name: promotionPosition
props.description: Creative slot name sent in analytics events (requires analyticsProperties=provided).

props.name: promotionProductId
props.description: Associated product ID sent in analytics events (requires analyticsProperties=provided).

props.name: promotionProductName
props.description: Associated product name sent in analytics events (requires analyticsProperties=provided).

props.name: blockClass
props.description: Custom CSS block class name to apply extra CSS handles for styling.

props.name: experimentalPreventLayoutShift
props.description: Wraps the image in a span to minimize cumulative layout shift (CLS) during load.

props.name: experimentalSetExplicitDimensions
props.description: Sets explicit width/height HTML attributes on the img element when dimensions are provided in px.

description: Renders a slider of images using the list-context.image-list content and the Slider Layout engine.

props.name: images
props.description: Array of image objects to be rendered in the slider.

props.name: height
props.description: Height in pixels applied to all images in the slider.

props.name: sliderLayoutConfig
props.description: Slider behaviour settings passed to the underlying Slider Layout (itemsPerPage, infinite, showNavigationArrows, showPaginationDots, usePagination).

props.name: preload
props.description: Preloads the first image in the slider, prioritising its display over other assets.

description: Renders a list of images that can be composed with other list-context blocks (e.g., slider-layout) to build image carousels and banners.

props.name: images
props.description: Array of objects declaring all images to be rendered, each with url, description, link, dimensions, loading strategy, and analytics properties.

props.name: height
props.description: Image height in px applied to all images declared in the images array.

props.name: experimentalPreventLayoutShift
props.description: Wraps each image in a span tag with preset width and/or height to minimize cumulative layout shift during page loading.

description: Renders a video player on the storefront, supporting YouTube, Vimeo, and self-hosted HTML5 video URLs with configurable controls, autoplay, mute, loop, and accessibility metadata.

props.name: src
props.description: URL of the video to be displayed; accepts YouTube, Vimeo, or self-hosted video URLs.

props.name: name
props.description: Video name used for SEO and accessibility purposes.

props.name: description
props.description: Video description used for SEO and accessibility purposes.

props.name: type
props.description: MIME type of the video (e.g., video/mp4).

props.name: poster
props.description: Cover image URL displayed before video playback begins.

props.name: controlsType
props.description: Type of player controls to display; custom-vtex only works with HTML5 videos.

props.name: autoPlay
props.description: Automatically starts video playback after loading; also sets muted to true.

props.name: muted
props.description: Starts the video with audio off when set to true.

props.name: loop
props.description: Replays the video continuously when set to true.

props.name: playsInline
props.description: Plays the video inline (within the element) rather than fullscreen on mobile.

props.name: width
props.description: Display area width in pixels or percentage.

props.name: height
props.description: Display area height in pixels or percentage.

props.name: PlayIcon
props.description: Custom play icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

props.name: PauseIcon
props.description: Custom pause icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

props.name: VolumeOnIcon
props.description: Custom volume-on icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

props.name: VolumeOffIcon
props.description: Custom volume-off icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

props.name: FullscreenIcon
props.description: Custom fullscreen icon ID used when controlsType is custom-vtex.

props.name: classes
props.description: Overrides default CSS handles; useful when the block is imported as a React component.
